title: The Advisor Who Changes Everything
subtitle: A visualisation for the meeting where you finally get the expert guidance your wealth building needs
excerpt: A short visualisation for the Day 74 theme of attracting the right advisors and deals. The scene is a meeting where someone who completely understands your vision is asking exactly the right questions. You leave with a clear next step and the sense that you are no longer doing this alone.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Forward projection imagery of this kind appears across coaching and therapeutic traditions. No single source is credited.

practice.whenToUse: Use when you have been managing wealth decisions in isolation and want to set the internal conditions for finding the right support.

content.text: A short visualisation for the Day 74 theme of attracting the right advisors and deals. The scene is a meeting where someone who completely understands your vision asks exactly the right questions. You leave with a clear next step and the knowledge that you are no longer doing this alone.
Sit somewhere quiet. Close your eyes or soften your gaze. Two or three slow breaths.

You are in a meeting. It could be an office, a coffee shop, a video call. The person opposite you is an advisor — an accountant, a financial planner, a solicitor, a mentor. The exact role doesn't matter. What matters is that they are the right person.

They ask a question about your vision. It is the specific question you have been waiting for someone to ask. Not the generic question, not the form-filling question. The one that shows they understand what you are actually building and why.

You answer. Your answer is clear. You know what you want and you can say it plainly. They listen without redirecting. When you finish, they tell you the next concrete thing to do. It is specific. It is doable. You can picture doing it this week.
The meeting ends. You leave with one piece of paper or one note on your phone. The decision that had been unclear is now a step. Let that picture settle. Then open your eyes.
Original to homemade.education. Forward projection imagery appears across therapeutic and coaching traditions — no single lineage is claimed.
